source_pr.title: *: Use a function to get the ONE, ZERO and NULL and fix the clone.
source_pr.body:


The `CONSTANT` has its state now, so we can't share a global variable anymore. Besides, the clone method need also change.

### What is changed and how it works?

Use function `NewOne`, `NewZero`, and `NewNull` to replace `One`, `Zero` and `Null`.
And create a new one in `Clone()`;


### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

It's just a simple refactoring, the whole logic is the same. 

- No code

Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: PR body includes a CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) around expression.Constant collation info.
failure_signature: PR body includes a CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) around expression.Constant collation info.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: Use a function to get the ONE, ZERO and NULL and fix the clone.
fix_pattern: *: Use a function to get the ONE, ZERO and NULL and fix the clone.

evidence: evidence: PR body includes a CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) around expression.Constant collation info.
evidence: replaces shared globals (One/Zero/Null) with constructors (NewOne/NewZero/NewNull) and adjusts Clone to create fresh constants to avoid shared mutable state (expression/constant.go etc).
